Steve's Verdict: Steve's #1 Pick

JLab Go Sport+ wireless earbuds: 35+ hr battery, secure earhook, C3 clear calling. Honest review + why my wife loves them for podcasts & calls (super comfy, never fall out). Pros/cons.

📝 Steve's Personal Notes

"Wireless earbuds can be a gamble – some fall out battery dies fast calls sound muffled – but my wife found her perfect pair with JLab Go Sport+ Wireless Workout Earbuds in Graphite."

Steve's Photo Proof

Every product on SteveGet is owned and tested by Steve. Here's the proof:

Pros & Cons

✅ Pros

  • Wife loves them – podcasts & calls sound great, super comfy
  • Secure earhook – no falling out during movement
  • 35+ hr battery – lasts days/weeks
  • C3 calling – clear voice, no background noise
  • Instant Bluetooth pairing every time
  • Multiple colors – black, graphite, etc.
  • Subscribe & Save = always ready, no run-outs

❌ Cons

  • Over-ear hook style – might feel different if used to tiny in-ear buds (wife prefers it)
  • No active noise cancel (great passive isolation for workouts/podcasts)
  • 3 EQ settings – solid but not audiophile-level customization

Key Specifications

secure earhook design
35+ hour battery life
C3 clear calling technology
3 EQ sound settings
lightweight and comfortable
sweat resistant
instant Bluetooth pairing
works great for podcasts, calls, music and workouts

Where to Buy

The JLab Go Sport+ Wireless Workout Earbuds Featuring C3 Clear Calling, Secure Earhook Sport Design, 35+ Hour Bluetooth Playtime, and 3 EQ Sound Settings (Graphite) is available from these trusted retailers. Pick the one you prefer — same great product, your choice of store.
